reporting_unit: Filing reports in USD millions (decimals=-6, scale=6 per XBRL tags). All monetary values multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw USD. Share counts reported in millions (decimals=-6, scale=6) and multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw count.

company_mapping.revenue: us-gaap:Revenues — line item 'Revenue' on income statement. NVDA reports a single revenue line with no sub-components on the face statement.
company_mapping.cogs: us-gaap:CostOfRevenue — line item 'Cost of revenue' on income statement.
company_mapping.gross_profit: us-gaap:GrossProfit — line item 'Gross profit' on income statement. Explicitly reported; equals Revenue minus Cost of revenue.
company_mapping.operating_income: us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss — line item 'Operating income' on income statement.
company_mapping.pretax_income: us-gaap:IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterest — line item 'Income before income tax' on income statement.
company_mapping.income_tax_expense: us-gaap:IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit — line item 'Income tax expense (benefit)' on income statement. Positive = expense, negative = benefit.
company_mapping.net_income: us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss — line item 'Net income' on income statement and cash flow statement starting line. No NCI; NVDA is consolidated parent only. Cross-statement check confirms IS and CF values match.
company_mapping.interest_expense: us-gaap:InterestExpense — line item 'Interest expense' on income statement. NVDA discloses gross interest expense separately from interest income on the face of the IS. Reported as a positive number in filing; normalized to negative per policy. FY2024: -257,000,000.
company_mapping.sbc: us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation — line item 'Stock-based compensation expense' in CF operating activities adjustments. CF addback is source of truth. FY2024: 3,549,000,000.
company_mapping.dna: us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization — line item 'Depreciation and amortization' in CF operating activities adjustments. Single D&A line; no separate components to sum. FY2024: 1,508,000,000.
company_mapping.diluted_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding — line item 'Diluted weighted average shares' on income statement. Reported in millions; converted to raw count.
company_mapping.cash: us-gaap:CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue — line item 'Cash and cash equivalents' on balance sheet.
company_mapping.short_term_investments: us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesCurrent — line item 'Marketable securities' on balance sheet. NVDA classifies short-term marketable securities here.
company_mapping.accounts_receivable: us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent — line item 'Accounts receivable, net' on balance sheet. Pure trade AR; no combined items on face.
company_mapping.inventory: us-gaap:InventoryNet — line item 'Inventories' on balance sheet. Breakdown available in XBRL notes (raw materials, WIP, finished goods) but face statement total used here.
company_mapping.accounts_payable: us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent — line item 'Accounts payable' on balance sheet. Reported as a standalone line; not combined with accrued liabilities on face.
company_mapping.total_assets: us-gaap:Assets — line item 'Total assets' on balance sheet.
company_mapping.equity: us-gaap:StockholdersEquity — line item 'Total shareholders equity' on balance sheet. No NCI; parent-only.
company_mapping.short_term_debt: us-gaap:DebtCurrent — line item 'Short-term debt' on balance sheet. FY2024: 1,250,000,000.
company_mapping.long_term_debt: us-gaap:LongTermDebtNoncurrent — line item 'Long-term debt' on balance sheet. FY2024: 8,459,000,000.
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities: Total operating lease liabilities = current (us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from XBRL notes, classified within AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent) + non-current (us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent from balance sheet face). FY2024: 228M + 1,119M = 1,347M confirmed by us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiability = 1,347M in XBRL notes. Both components are separate from debt line items so no double-counting. Raw: 1,347,000,000.
company_mapping.operating_lease_current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from XBRL not-on-statement data. FY2024: 228,000,000. Embedded within AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent on face statement.
company_mapping.operating_lease_noncurrent: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent — line item 'Long-term operating lease liabilities' on balance sheet face. FY2024: 1,119,000,000.
company_mapping.cfo: us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInOperatingActivities — line item 'Net cash provided by operating activities' on cash flow statement. FY2024: 28,090,000,000.
company_mapping.capex: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets — line item 'Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets' on cash flow statement investing section. NVDA combines PP&E and intangibles into one capex line. Reported as outflow; normalized to negative per policy. FY2024: -1,069,000,000.
company_mapping.acquisitions: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired — line item 'Acquisitions, net of cash acquired' on cash flow statement investing section. Normalized to negative per policy. FY2024: -83,000,000.
company_mapping.rd_expense: us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense — line item 'Research and development' under operating expenses on income statement. FY2024: 8,675,000,000.
company_mapping.interest_income: us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest — line item 'Interest income' on income statement. Used for unlevered FCF and interest coverage context. FY2024: 866,000,000.
company_mapping.cash_paid_for_interest: us-gaap:InterestPaidNet — supplemental disclosure 'Cash paid for interest' on cash flow statement. Used for Metric 21 Unlevered FCF. FY2024: 252,000,000.
company_mapping.inventory_raw_materials: us-gaap:InventoryRawMaterialsNetOfReserves — XBRL not-on-statement, Balance Sheet Components note. FY2024: 1,719,000,000.
company_mapping.inventory_wip: us-gaap:InventoryWorkInProcessNetOfReserves — XBRL not-on-statement, Balance Sheet Components note. FY2024: 1,505,000,000.
company_mapping.inventory_finished_goods: us-gaap:InventoryFinishedGoodsNetOfReserves — XBRL not-on-statement, Balance Sheet Components note. FY2024: 2,058,000,000.
company_mapping.diluted_shares_adjustment: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberDilutedSharesOutstandingAdjustment — XBRL not-on-statement, EPS note. Dilutive impact of outstanding equity awards. FY2024: 25,000,000 shares raw.
company_mapping.segment_revenue_compute_networking: Segment revenue for Compute and Networking from segment data. FY2024: 47,405,000,000.
company_mapping.segment_revenue_graphics: Segment revenue for Graphics from segment data. FY2024: 13,517,000,000.
company_mapping.segment_oi_compute_networking: Segment operating income for Compute and Networking. FY2024: 32,016,000,000.
company_mapping.segment_oi_graphics: Segment operating income for Graphics. FY2024: 5,846,000,000.
company_mapping.revenue_data_center: Revenue by market — Data Center from ProductOrServiceAxis segment data. FY2024: 47,525,000,000.
company_mapping.revenue_professional_visualization: Revenue by market — Professional Visualization. FY2024: 1,553,000,000.
company_mapping.revenue_oem_other: Revenue by market — OEM and Other. FY2024: 306,000,000.
